title: Squirrel Removal in Melrose, Bronx | $900-$2,500 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal services in Melrose, Bronx. Humane trapping, exclusion & attic cleanup. Licensed experts serving Melrose residents. Call today for a free estimate!
intro: Squirrels infiltrating your Melrose home through roof vents, soffits, or attic spaces? Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive squirrel removal services throughout the Melrose neighborhood, protecting your property from damage and health hazards. Our licensed wildlife technicians use humane, effective methods to eliminate squirrel infestations and prevent future entry.
whyUs: With over a decade serving Bronx residents, Best Pest Control NYC understands the unique wildlife challenges facing Melrose's pre-war apartment buildings and multi-family homes. Our technicians are fully licensed, insured, and equipped to handle squirrel problems of any size, offering same-day emergency service and guaranteed results for complete peace of mind.
localContext: Melrose's proximity to St. Mary's Park and the tree-lined streets near East 149th Street create ideal conditions for squirrel populations to thrive and seek shelter in nearby buildings. The neighborhood's classic brownstones and older residential structures are particularly vulnerable to squirrel entry through aging rooflines, chimneys, and architectural gaps that provide easy access to warm attic spaces.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Melrose?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal in Melrose typically ranges from $900 to $2,500 depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and extent of damage. This includes humane trapping, exclusion work to seal entry points, and sanitation services. We provide free inspections and upfront pricing with no hidden fees.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove squirrels from my Melrose home?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service throughout Melrose for urgent squirrel problems. The complete removal process typically takes 3-7 days depending on the number of squirrels present. Our technicians will set humane traps, monitor activity, seal entry points after all squirrels are removed, and ensure your home is fully protected.

faqs.question: What damage can squirrels cause to homes in Melrose?
faqs.answer: Squirrels can cause significant damage to Melrose homes by chewing through electrical wiring (creating fire hazards), damaging insulation, gnawing on wood beams and siding, contaminating attics with urine and feces, and creating entry points that allow water intrusion. They can also make noise disturbances and potentially carry parasites or diseases.

faqs.question: Do you offer guarantees for squirrel removal in Melrose?
faqs.answer: Yes, we provide a comprehensive warranty on all squirrel exclusion work in Melrose. If squirrels re-enter through any area we've sealed, we'll return at no additional charge to resolve the issue. Our exclusion methods are designed to permanently prevent squirrel entry while maintaining the integrity and appearance of your property.
